zh.Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales: 威爾士福林爾利斯 Y 可德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl於大約1044年出生在威爾士福林爾利斯 Y 可德時，他的父親Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl26歲，母親Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn24歲。他於1064年與Morwyl ferch Ednywain在威爾士結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1105年在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在威爾士福林爾利斯 Y 可德。

zh-hans.Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales: 威尔士福林爾利斯 Y 可德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl于大约1044年出生在威尔士福林爾利斯 Y 可德时，他的父亲Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl26岁，母亲Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn24岁。他于1064年与Morwyl ferch Ednywain在威尔士结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1105年在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在威尔士福林爾利斯 Y 可德。

nameMeanings.name: Edwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Arul, Chandra, Chitra, Kumar.

English: from the Middle English personal name Edwin (Old English Ēadwine, from ēad ‘prosperity’ + wine ‘friend’). The name Edwin is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Edison
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Ed(de) (a pet form of male and female names beginning with Ed-, such as Edwin , Edward , and Edith , all derived from Old English names beginning with ēad ‘prosperity’) + -son. Occasionally, the name may also be a shortened form of Middle English Edithson ‘son of Edith’, or come from the Middle English female personal name Edus (a pet form of Edith) + -son.

History: The inventor Thomas Alva Edison, born in 1847 in Milan, OH, came from a Canadian family first established in North America by John Edison, a loyalist during the American Revolution, who served under the British General Richard Howe and went into exile in NS, Canada, after the Revolutionary War.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl was born about 1044, in Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales, his father, Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl, was 26 and his mother, Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, was 24. He married Morwyl ferch Ednywain in 1064, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1105, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl est né environ 1044, à Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Morwyl ferch Ednywain en 1064, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1105, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl um 1044 in Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl 26 und seine Mutter Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn 24. Er hat 1064 in Wales Morwyl ferch Ednywain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1105 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales begraben.

ht.Flintshire, Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl è nato il circa 1044 nel Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Galles, il suo padre, Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Morwyl ferch Ednywain nel 1064, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1105, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Galles.

ja.Flintshire, Wales: イギリスウェールズフリントシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Owain ab Edwin of Tegeinglが約1044年にウェールズフリントシュアイアリス イ コエドで生まれた時，父Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeinglは26歳，母Iwerydd Verch Cynfynは24歳であった。1064年にウェールズでMorwyl ferch Ednywainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1105年に故郷で62歳で死去し，ウェールズフリントシュアイアリス イ コエドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl(이)가 대략 1044년 웨일스 플린츠히르 리스 이 코드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1064년 웨일스에서 Morwyl ferch Ednywain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1105년 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 플린츠히르 리스 이 코드에 묻혔다.

mg.Flintshire, Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl nasceu aproximadamente 1044, em Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Morwyl ferch Ednywain em 1064, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1105, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl родился около 1044 г. в местности ллиз и коед, флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Morwyl ferch Ednywain в 1064 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1105 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности ллиз и коед, флинцхир, Уэльс.

sm.BET 1058 AND 1105: mai le 1058 e o'o I le 1105

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl nació aproximadamente 1044, en Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Morwyl ferch Ednywain en 1064, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1105, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Gales.
